mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM cat_dynamic_form_linkage_rule WHERE form_id = #{formId}
AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cat_dynamic_form_linkage_rule (id, form_id, version, name, target_field_id, action_type, action_value, enable, sort_order, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_time) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), form_id, #{targetVersion}, name, target_field_id, action_type, action_value, enable, sort_order, '0', create_by, NOW(), NOW() FROM cat_dynamic_form_linkage_rule WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND version = #{sourceVersion} AND deleted = '0'
